card.text_raw_chs: 每当你花费{singleStarIcon}时，每花费一点{singleStarIcon}，获得{BlockForStars:diff()}点[gold]格挡[/gold]。
card.text_default_chs: 每当你花费☆时，每花费一点☆，获得2点格挡。
card.text_upgraded_chs: 每当你花费☆时，每花费一点☆，获得4点格挡。
card.text_raw_eng: Whenever you spend {singleStarIcon}, gain {BlockForStars:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each {singleStarIcon} spent.
